name: MAC-10 | 赛博恶魔
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been custom painted with a cybernetic demon on the side and between the wire stock. Crackling energy and cold steel
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这款定制涂装的侧面和线托之间为赛博恶魔图案。 噼啪作响的能量与冷酷的钢铁
